title: Kanbus clock: show issue description on transition cards

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing transition-card body update: include issue description line between ID and FROM/TO fields, with wrapping/clipping safeguards.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented transition-card summary line above FROM/TO: uses payload title/description first, then kbs show fallback (cached), wrapped to fit display. Updated dynamic styling indices and tests. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (17 passed).
